name: Kay's Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sliced apples with sugar.
2. Pour into a pie crust.
3. Top with pieces of butter.
4. Sprinkle with flour and cinnamon.
5. Place the top crust on the pie.
6. Spread milk over the crust.
7. Sprinkle with additional cinnamon and sugar.
8. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour. (Note: Spray a 9-inch pie plate with Pam before placing the crust in)
To freeze: Put apples and sugar in a freezer bag. Add 1 tablespoon of fruit fresh and freeze. Defrost in the microwave until able to separate, then cook a little longer.
